recipe.title: Crispy leftover lamb flatbread
recipe.description: Super-quick and delicious gnarly spiced-lamb flatbread, topped with fresh rainbow slaw, cooling yoghurt and chilli sauce.

steps.descr: Place the flour in a large bowl with a tiny pinch of...
steps.instructions: Place the flour in a large bowl with a tiny pinch of salt and 100ml of cold water. Mix together with a fork until it starts to come together, then use your hand to gently knead into a soft dough and set aside to rest.

on_enter.say: Place the flour in a large bowl with a tiny pinch of salt and 100ml of cold water. Mix together with a fork until it starts to come together, then use your hand to gently knead into a soft dough and set aside to rest.

steps.descr: Coarsely grate the carrot, cabbage and radishes into a...
steps.instructions: Coarsely grate the carrot, cabbage and radishes into a large bowl. Pick and roughly chop the mint leaves, saving a few smaller ones for later, and add to the bowl. Squeeze over the juice of ½ a lemon, season to perfection, and set aside.

on_enter.say: Coarsely grate the carrot, cabbage and radishes into a large bowl. Pick and roughly chop the mint leaves, saving a few smaller ones for later, and add to the bowl. Squeeze over the juice of ½ a lemon, season to perfection, and set aside.

steps.descr: Place a large, non-stick frying pan over a high heat
steps.instructions: Place a large, non-stick frying pan over a high heat. Roll out the dough on a flour-dusted surface until just under ½ cm thick. Lay into the dry pan and cook for 1½ minutes on each side, until golden and charred.

on_enter.say: Place a large, non-stick frying pan over a high heat. Roll out the dough on a flour-dusted surface until just under ½ cm thick. Lay into the dry pan and cook for 1½ minutes on each side, until golden and charred.

steps.descr: Meanwhile, roughly chop the lamb and place in a bowl...
steps.instructions: Meanwhile, roughly chop the lamb and place in a bowl with the coriander, oregano, the zest of 1 lemon, 1 teaspoon of olive oil, a pinch of salt and pepper, and gently toss to combine.

on_enter.say: Meanwhile, roughly chop the lamb and place in a bowl with the coriander, oregano, the zest of 1 lemon, 1 teaspoon of olive oil, a pinch of salt and pepper, and gently toss to combine.

steps.descr: Place a medium frying pan on a high heat, add the lamb...
steps.instructions: Place a medium frying pan on a high heat, add the lamb and fry for 10 minutes, until golden and crispy. Squeeze over the lemon juice, drizzle with the honey and toss it all together.

on_enter.say: Place a medium frying pan on a high heat, add the lamb and fry for 10 minutes, until golden and crispy. Squeeze over the lemon juice, drizzle with the honey and toss it all together.

steps.descr: Lay the flatbread over the lamb in the pan and gently...
steps.instructions: Lay the flatbread over the lamb in the pan and gently push down to soak up the lovely juices, then turn out onto a board.

on_enter.say: Lay the flatbread over the lamb in the pan and gently push down to soak up the lovely juices, then turn out onto a board.

steps.descr: Pile the slaw over the lamb, sprinkle with the reserved...
steps.instructions: Pile the slaw over the lamb, sprinkle with the reserved mint leaves, and drizzle with yoghurt and a drizzle of chilli sauce, if you like. Roll up, cut in half and serve.

on_enter.say: Pile the slaw over the lamb, sprinkle with the reserved mint leaves, and drizzle with yoghurt and a drizzle of chilli sauce, if you like. Roll up, cut in half and serve.
